allow: Bash(npx eslint src/pages/PlayerTournamentView.tsx src/pages/TournamentMatches.tsx src/pages/TournamentJoin.tsx src/utils/playerStorage.ts --max-warnings=0)
Bash(npx supabase db query "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''public'' AND table_name LIKE ''%workspace%'';")
Bash(npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''public'' AND table_name LIKE ''%workspace%'';")

hooks.command: cd /c/Users/ashle/Code/tournamentOrganiser && printf 'y\n' | npx supabase db reset
